en: Does your company have training/certification programs for certifying Craftsmen?
Does your company have practical (hands-on) testing programs for certifying Craftsmen?
Does your company have written Workforce Development policies and procedures?
Does your company have a Short Service Employee (SSE) policy that identifies new employees or experienced employees new to your company or new in their position?
Does your company's SSE policy include a means to visually identify a SSE?
Does your company's SSE policy include assigning a mentor to the SSE?
Does your company's SSE policy define the roles and responsibility of the SSE mentor?
Emergencies may include but not limited to fire, explosion, or toxic release hazards
Does your company instruct each employee the process and the applicable provisions of the emergency action plan related to his/her job?
